name: lint-fix
description: Lint all RTL files, fix errors and warnings, generate lint_report.txt

tasks.content: Run /lint-all — get full error and warning list
tasks.detail: Run /lint-all. Record: total errors, total warnings, per-file breakdown. Do not fix anything yet.

tasks.content: Fix all lint errors (0 errors target)
tasks.detail: Fix each error type: undeclared signals → add declarations; multiple drivers → remove duplicates; implicit nets → add `default_nettype none. Re-run /lint-all after each group.

tasks.content: Fix lint warnings (latch, width mismatch, implicit)
tasks.detail: Priority: latch inferred → add default in always_comb; width mismatch → add explicit slice; implicit net → declare logic. Document unfixable warnings.
Run /lint-all. Confirm 0 errors, 0 warnings. If warnings remain, document reason in lint_report.txt.
Run /report to write lint_report.txt. Verify file contains: date, files, tool, result, fixed list, remaining list.
